---
title: "AquaSat V2 Paper Figure Drafts"
output: 
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r, results = "hide"}
# Set global options to hide code from the final manuscript
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

# Load reticulate and activate project-local Python environment
library(reticulate)
use_virtualenv("./.venv", required = TRUE)
```

# Draft figures and code for the AquaSat V2 paper

## 1. Workflow/Data Architecture Diagram

Uses Python {diagrams} library

```{python, results = "hide"}
from diagrams import Diagram, Cluster, Edge
from diagrams.generic.compute import Rack
from diagrams.generic.storage import Storage
from diagrams.custom import Custom

# Defaults
cluster_styles = {
    "labeljust": "c",
    "fontname": "Helvetica-Bold",
    "fontsize": "14"
}

# Define the diagram properties (Left-to-Right layout)
with Diagram("<<b>AquaSat V2 Data Architecture</b>>", filename="figs/aquasat_ecosystem", show=False, direction="LR",
graph_attr={"fontsize": "24"}):

    wqp_data = Custom("WQP Data\n(NWIS & WQX)", "../resources/uxwing/database-db-icon.png")
        
    # This node uses an invisible Cluster to force more white space and prevent
    # text overlaps
    with Cluster("", graph_attr={"style": "invis", "margin": "80.0"}):
      download = Custom("AquaMatch_download_WQP\nSystematic Retrieval",
      "../resources/uxwing/database-download-icon.png")
   
   
   
    # with Cluster("AquaMatch_harmonize_WQP\nMulti-step Harmonization",
    with Cluster("<<b>AquaMatch_harmonize_WQP</b><br/>Multi-step Harmonization>",
    graph_attr={"labeljust": "c", "fontname": "Helvetica", "fontsize": "14",
    "margin": "30,0"}):
        harmonization = Custom("  Rigorous Harmonization  \n(SME Input)",
        "../resources/uxwing/filter-setting-icon.png")
        aggregation = Custom("Aggregation Routine",
        "../resources/uxwing/consolidation-arrow-icon_point_right.png")
        
    harmonized_db = Custom("Harmonized\nIn-Situ Data", "../resources/uxwing/table-edit-icon.png")
    
    # Flow for Top Pipeline
    wqp_data >> download >> harmonization >> aggregation >> harmonized_db

    # -------------------------------------------------
    # Bottom Pipeline: Remote Sensing Data
    # -------------------------------------------------
    landsat = Custom("Landsat Collection 2\nTM, ETM+, OLI, TIRS", "../resources/uxwing/satellite-icon.png")
        
    with Cluster("Google Earth Engine & R Pipelines",
    graph_attr=cluster_styles):
        gee_data = Custom("Data: SR & ST",
        "../resources/uxwing/database-download-icon.png")
        gee_cal = Custom("Intermission Calibration",
        "../resources/uxwing/control-panel-icon.png")
        # CUSTOM ICON: Filter Settings
        gee_qual = Custom("Quality Filters", "../resources/uxwing/filter-setting-icon.png")
        
    # Flow for GEE preprocessing
    landsat >> gee_data >> gee_cal >> gee_qual

    # The 3 parallel spatial resolution stacks
    with Cluster("<<b>AquaSat Stacks</b>>", graph_attr={"labeljust": "c",
    "fontname":"Helvetica", "fontsize": "14", "margin": "25,0"}):
        site_sr = Custom("AquaMatch_siteSR\nSample Site Stacks",
        "../resources/uxwing/layer-icon.png")
        lake_sr = Custom("AquaMatch_lakeSR\nLentic Waterbody Stacks",
        "../resources/uxwing/layer-icon.png")
        river_sr = Custom("riverSR\nLotic Waterbody Stacks",
        "../resources/uxwing/layer-icon.png")
        
    # CUSTOM ICONS: Site, Lake, and River Data Product Tables
    site_db = Custom("siteSR\nData Product", "../resources/uxwing/table-edit-icon.png")
    lake_db = Custom("lakeSR\nData Product", "../resources/uxwing/table-edit-icon.png")
    river_db = Custom("riverSR\nData Product", "../resources/uxwing/table-edit-icon.png")

    # Connect GEE output to the three stacks, and stacks to their databases
    gee_qual >> site_sr >> site_db
    gee_qual >> lake_sr >> lake_db
    gee_qual >> river_sr >> river_db

    # -------------------------------------------------
    # Final Stage: Matchups & Modeling
    # -------------------------------------------------
    with Cluster("Core Pairing Engine", graph_attr=cluster_styles):
        # CUSTOM ICON: Coding/Pairing Engine
        matchups = Custom("AquaMatchr\nR Package", "../resources/uxwing/compare-match-icon.png")
        
    ready_data = Storage("Analysis-Ready\nMatchup Datasets")
    
    # This node represents the tall vertical red bar in the image
    analysis = Custom("Analysis and\nModeling",
    "../resources/uxwing/diagnostic-pulse-icon.png")
    
    final_product = Custom("Remote Sensing\nQuality Modeling\n& Products", "../resources/uxwing/data-science-icon.png")

    # Connect the harmonized DB and the siteSR DB into the matchup engine
    harmonized_db >> matchups
    site_db >> matchups
    
    # Connect matchups out to modeling
    matchups >> ready_data >> analysis >> final_product
    
    # Connect the remaining data products directly to analysis
    lake_db >> analysis
    river_db >> analysis
```

```{r}
# Display the image generated by the Python chunk above
knitr::include_graphics("figs/aquasat_ecosystem.png")
```
